The '''Zirfan Glacier''' was a large glacier on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]]. It was located just north of the [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Rhire]], and halted at the foot of the [[Sennes Mountains]]. Wild [[gabal]]s subsisted on the surface of the glacier and were hunted by native Rhinnalians for their wool. [[Firehead|Rhinnalian fireheads]] burrowed into the ice of the glacier from above, and the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] underneath the glacier teemed with spectacular, undiscovered life forms.<ref name="CC" />
